content:
We are Hiring – District Manager | Sahaj Retail Limited

Join Sahaj Retail Limited and be a part of India's fintech journey. We are looking for dynamic professionals to expand our retailer and partner network, build strong business relationships, drive sales growth, and achieve business targets across Madhya Pradesh, West Bengal, Odisha, Rajasthan, Jharkhand, Uttar Pradesh, Assam, and Maharashtra. 

If you have 1–5 years of experience in FinTech with Channel Sales Development and are passionate about business growth, we would love to hear from you. 

Share your updated CV at: rajeev.karmakar@sahaj.co.in
